user_query: I want to surprise my family with personalized horoscope readings based on their zodiac signs. Can you provide horoscope information for each family member for the upcoming month? Also, recommend a radio station that plays a mix of their favorite music genres.

TaskList.description: Collect zodiac signs for each family member.
Fetch horoscope information for the upcoming month based on the collected zodiac signs.
Recommend a radio station that plays a mix of favorite music genres for the family.
Compile and format the horoscope readings and radio station recommendation for presentation.
